items.name: all
items.title: All Elements
items.description: Install all Avail widgets. For new integrations, use @avail-widgets/nexus instead - it provides unified swap, send, and deposit in one component.

items.name: bridge-deposit
items.title: Bridge Deposit
items.description: Deprecated: use Nexus Widget instead. Bridge Deposit has been removed in favor of Nexus Widget deposit mode.

meta.deprecationMessage: Bridge Deposit is deprecated in favor of Nexus Widget. Use @avail-widgets/nexus with config.mode = "deposit" for new integrations.

items.docs: Deprecated in favor of Nexus Widget. Use @avail-widgets/nexus with config.mode = "deposit" for new integrations.

items.name: deposit
items.title: Deposit
items.description: Deprecated: use Nexus Widget instead. A legacy component built with Nexus to enable deposits.

meta.deprecationMessage: Deposit is deprecated in favor of Nexus Widget. Use @avail-widgets/nexus with config.mode = "deposit" for new integrations.

items.docs: Deprecated in favor of Nexus Widget. Use @avail-widgets/nexus with config.mode = "deposit" for new integrations.

items.name: fast-bridge
items.title: Fast Bridge
items.description: Deprecated: use Nexus Widget instead. A legacy component built with Nexus to enable cross chain bridging.

meta.deprecationMessage: Fast Bridge is deprecated in favor of Nexus Widget. Use @avail-widgets/nexus for new integrations.

items.docs: Deprecated in favor of Nexus Widget. Use @avail-widgets/nexus for new integrations.

items.name: nexus
items.title: Nexus Widget
items.description: The unified Avail Nexus widget for swap, send, and deposit flows. One component for all cross-chain operations powered by Nexus intents.
items.docs: NexusWidget is the single recommended component for all cross-chain flows. Supports config.mode = "swap" | "send" | "deposit" | "fastBridge".

items.name: nexus-provider
items.title: Nexus Provider
items.description: Shared Nexus SDK provider and types for Avail Widgets

items.name: swaps
items.title: Swaps
items.description: Deprecated: use Nexus Widget instead. Legacy swap tokens across chains component.

meta.deprecationMessage: Swaps is deprecated in favor of Nexus Widget. Use @avail-widgets/nexus with config.mode = "swap" for new integrations.

items.docs: Deprecated in favor of Nexus Widget. Use @avail-widgets/nexus with config.mode = "swap" for new integrations.

items.name: transfer
items.title: Fast Transfer
items.description: Deprecated: use Nexus Widget instead. A legacy component built with Nexus to enable cross chain transfer.

meta.deprecationMessage: Fast Transfer is deprecated in favor of Nexus Widget. Use @avail-widgets/nexus with config.mode = "send" for new integrations.

items.docs: Deprecated in favor of Nexus Widget. Use @avail-widgets/nexus with config.mode = "send" for new integrations.

items.name: unified-balance
items.title: Unified Balance
items.description: Deprecated: use Nexus Widget instead. Unified Balance has been removed in favor of Nexus Widget's inline balance views.

meta.deprecationMessage: Unified Balance is deprecated in favor of Nexus Widget. Use @avail-widgets/nexus for new integrations.

items.docs: Deprecated in favor of Nexus Widget. NexusWidget includes inline balance views during swap, send, and deposit flows.

items.name: utils
items.title: Utils (cn)
items.description: Utility helpers used by UI components

items.name: view-history
items.title: View History
items.description: Deprecated: use Nexus Widget instead. View History has been removed. Use sdk.getMyIntents() for programmatic access.

meta.deprecationMessage: View History is deprecated. Use sdk.getMyIntents() for programmatic intent history access.

items.docs: Deprecated in favor of Nexus Widget. Intent history is not included in Nexus Widget V1. Use sdk.getMyIntents() directly.
